memberdef.argsstring: (V const &x, V const *&lhs, V const *&rhs) const
memberdef.name: handle_binary_args

detaileddescription.para: Return const expressions as Eq(underlying), except for Noop, otherwise return Expression(underlying) unchanged

Pipe functional expressions in composition, s.t. a | b is equivalent to Compose(b, a).
zmbt::expr::Compose

briefdescription.para: Pack expression results into an array.
